title: フェブラリーSの後に・はじめて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara gives it her all once again in the
February Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide her next race should be one that's a
slightly longer distance, the Elm Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, while on her way to the winning
concert, Haru Urara runs into a friend of hers who
is down in the dumps from losing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her friend bitterly laments not having won the
race and being unable to perform center stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara is completely shocked to see another
side of her friend, who is usually so cheerful.
